description: Real feature store, real-time signals pipeline, and vector embedding service. Upgrade the existing feature-store in packages/ml-pipeline to wire to real Redis (online) and S3 (offline) with proper pipeline. Add NATS-based event aggregator for real-time signals. Add embedding service that calls OpenAI text-embedding-3-small and self-hosted multilingual-e5 via Triton.
steps: Enhance packages/ml-pipeline/src/feature-store/pipeline.ts: add a FeatureAggregator class that consumes user events from NATS (interface NatsSubscriber for DI), computes rolling aggregates (view count, click rate, session duration, topic affinities), and writes to OnlineFeatureStore. Add a BackfillJob class that reads from OnlineFeatureStore and writes historical snapshots to OfflineFeatureStore on a schedule.

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/feature-store/nats-consumer.ts: NatsFeatureConsumer class implementing NatsSubscriber interface. Subscribes to 'user.events.*' subjects. Parses event payloads (view, click, like, share, dwell, dismiss). Calls FeatureAggregator.processEvent() for each.

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/feature-store/aggregator.ts: FeatureAggregator class. Maintains sliding-window counters per user. Methods: processEvent(event), getAggregatedFeatures(userId), flushToOnlineStore(). Computes: total_views_1h, total_views_24h, click_through_rate, avg_dwell_time, topic_affinity_vector (10-dim), session_count_7d.

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/embedding-service.ts: EmbeddingService class. Two backends: OpenAIEmbeddings (calls OpenAI API for text-embedding-3-small, 1536-dim) and TritonEmbeddings (calls Triton for multilingual-e5-base, 768-dim). Language detection to route: English -> OpenAI, Hindi/Indic -> Triton multilingual. Interface EmbeddingBackend for DI. Batch embedding support.
Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/__tests__/aggregator.test.ts: test event processing, sliding window behavior, feature computation correctness.
Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/__tests__/embedding-service.test.ts: test language routing, batch embedding, error handling with fallback.
Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/__tests__/nats-consumer.test.ts: test subscription, event parsing, aggregator integration.
Update packages/ml-pipeline/src/index.ts barrel to export new modules.
Add models/multilingual-e5/1/ placeholder and config.pbtxt in the models/ directory (created in FEAT-001).
Ensure all existing tests in packages/ml-pipeline still pass after changes.
acceptance_criteria: FeatureAggregator correctly computes rolling aggregates from event streams (tested)
EmbeddingService routes English to OpenAI backend and Hindi to Triton backend (tested)
NatsFeatureConsumer correctly parses events and forwards to aggregator (tested)
BackfillJob reads online features and writes to offline store (tested)
All new tests pass: pnpm test --filter=@quant/ml-pipeline
findings: All acceptance criteria met. 95 tests pass across 8 test files (12 aggregator, 17 embedding-service, 9 nats-consumer, 6 backfill-job, plus existing tests). Typecheck passes clean. Prettier formatted via lint-staged hook on commit. The FeatureAggregator uses in-memory sliding window with a simple hash-based topic affinity. EmbeddingService routes based on Indic Unicode range detection.
